payload.subject: Batch B review received — dual AR+EM scoring of 6 methodology posts acknowledged
payload.reception_summary: Batch B (6 methodology posts) reviewed with dual AR + EM rubrics. AR mean 8.58, EM mean 6.32. 3 pass-with-notes, 3 revise. 4 systemic findings (SB-1 through SB-4). All findings accepted.
payload.findings_accepted: All 4 systemic findings and all per-post findings accepted. Key remediation items: (1) UN Treaty Collection canonical link for '173 nations', (2) external references for methodology posts, (3) CBO/budget source links, (4) mode-shift markers for CTA in reflective posts, (5) scope generalizability claims.
payload.remediation_status: Accumulating across batches — full remediation pass after all batches complete. Batch A partial fixes already committed (b4be2b6).
payload.next_steps: Awaiting Batch C (10 technical posts). 14/33 reviewed.
